prompt: Cinematic hero image for LetAtlas AI company website. A powerful gold wireframe Atlas figure in a kneeling pose, arms raised, supporting a constellation network of glowing business operation icons — calendar, invoice, phone, email, clipboard, dollar sign — connected by neural network lines. Deep navy blue #1B3A5C and gold #C9A84C tones. Dark background #0A0A0A fading to pure black at edges. The figure radiates quiet power and reliability. Premium, inspiring, no text.
